    • Deprecated Fields
      Field
      Description
      com.jamii.users.controller.UserData.CURRENT_STATUS_OFF
      This status is no longer needed as of 2025-12-16.
      com.jamii.users.controller.UserData.CURRENT_STATUS_ON
      This status is no longer needed as of 2025-12-16.
      com.jamii.utils.JamiiConstants.RESPONSE_REMOVE_FOLLOW_REQUEST
      Use JamiiConstants.RESPONSE_REJECT_FOLLOW_REQUEST instead
      com.jamii.utils.JamiiConstants.RESPONSE_REMOVE_FRIEND_REQUEST
      Use JamiiConstants.RESPONSE_REJECT_FRIEND_REQUEST instead
    • Deprecated Methods
      Method
      Description
      com.jamii.administrative.controllers.ClientCommunication.save(ClientCommunicationTBL)
      Use ClientCommunication.save() instead which operates on the data field
      com.jamii.jDrive.controllers.FileDirectory.add(FileDirectoryTBL)
      Use FileDirectory.save() instead which operates on the data field
      com.jamii.jDrive.controllers.FileDirectory.update(FileDirectoryTBL)
      Use FileDirectory.save() instead which operates on the data field
      com.jamii.jDrive.controllers.FileTableOwner.update(FileTableOwnerTBL)
      Use FileTableOwner.save() instead which operates on the data field
      com.jamii.social.controllers.UserBlockList.update(UserBlockListTBL)
      Use UserBlockList.save() instead which operates on the data field
      com.jamii.social.controllers.UserRequest.update(UserRequestsTBL)
      Use UserRequest.save() instead which operates on the data field
      com.jamii.users.controller.DeviceInformation.update(DeviceInformationTBL)
      Use DeviceInformation.save() instead which operates on the data field

      Method not yet implemented

      Method not yet implemented

      Method not yet implemented

      Method not yet implemented
      com.jamii.users.controller.UserCookies.update(UserCookiesTBL)
      Use UserCookies.save() instead which operates on the data field
      com.jamii.users.controller.UserData.migratePreviousRecordtoUserHistory(UserLoginTBL)
      This method is no longer needed
      com.jamii.users.controller.UserLogin.add(CreateNewUserREQ)
      This method should be replaced with a more modern approach
      com.jamii.users.controller.UserLogin.createNewUser(CreateNewUserREQ)
      Use UserLogin.add(CreateNewUserREQ) instead
